summary: A Russian Ka-52 helicopter was downed near Nadiivka, Donetsk region, with its crew killed after a crash landing and subsequent drone strikes during evacuation. A Russian FPV drone struck a civilian vehicle in Nikopol, Dnipropetrovsk region, killing two people. A Ukrainian FPV drone destroyed a Russian logistics vehicle carrying 152mm artillery ammunition, with the crew's status unknown. The "Elka" anti-drone system performed kinetic intercepts on Ukrainian fixed-wing drones "Maya" and "Darts," triggering onboard charges. Airstrikes targeted a Ukrainian drone launch point and air defense system in Krasnoyarskoye, DNR. The "Rubikon" Center reported 83 targets destroyed on March 21, 2026, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and control points. Iranian-backed militia used a fiber-optic FPV drone to attack the US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport. A Russian infantryman was killed in a failed bayonet charge against a Ukrainian FPV drone.
